subcodes.first_line: This is the Day in which the Hidden is made manifest and all the prophecies of the past ages are fulfilled
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه تنادی الاشیاء یا ملا الانشاء قد خرق الحجاب الاکبر و تزین المنظر
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @goodly deeds; actions, @free will and predestination; fate, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transcendence; unknowability of God
